_comment: v9 corpus manifest — Kotlin arm. The .template.json is committed; the operator copies this to corpus-manifest-kotlin.local.json (gitignored, see the **/corpus-manifest.local.json rule) and fills in the local_clone_path for each repo. See v9-plan-2026-07-02-update.md for the corpus build process and methodology-minimum-sample-size.md for the guardrails (10k files per arm, 10 fires per DORMANT rule, 5% parse-failure ceiling).

neg_repos.name: ktor
neg_repos.rationale: Ktor pre-1.0; canonical Kotlin server framework; pre-LLM-coding-boom

neg_repos.name: okhttp
neg_repos.rationale: Square OkHttp; mature Kotlin-friendly HTTP client

neg_repos.name: retrofit
neg_repos.rationale: Square Retrofit; mature type-safe HTTP client

neg_repos.name: arrow
neg_repos.rationale: Arrow pre-1.0; functional programming for Kotlin; pre-AI

neg_repos.name: exposed
neg_repos.rationale: JetBrains Exposed; SQL framework on Kotlin; pre-AI

neg_repos.name: coil
neg_repos.rationale: Coil pre-1.0; image loader for Android; pre-AI

neg_repos.name: intellij-community-samples-pre-2018
neg_repos.rationale: IntelliJ Community 2018.1 (early-2018, pre-AI); Kotlin plugin samples
neg_repos.note: idea/183.4284.37 is the 2018.1 build (Mar 2018) — strictly before the 2018-06-01 neg cutoff.

pos_repos.name: spring-ai-kotlin-samples
pos_repos.rationale: Spring AI Kotlin samples; LLM integration in Kotlin (2024-12+)

pos_repos.name: ktor-ai-samples
pos_repos.rationale: Ktor AI samples; LLM server endpoints in Kotlin

pos_repos.name: cursor-kotlin-tutorials
pos_repos.rationale: Cursor-published Kotlin AI coding tutorials; post-2024-12

v8_corpus_avoidance: Verify these repos were NOT in the v7 or v8 corpus (per methodology-minimum-sample-size.md's cross-corpus contamination guard). grep -l any of these names under ~/.slopbrick-cache/v7-repos/ or v8-repos/ before running.
build_process: 2. For each repo, run: git fetch --unshallow && git checkout <ref>
3. Compute the filelist (handled by build-v9-corpus.ts --ext kt,kts --arm kotlin)

success_criteria.rules_measurable: ≥ 5 (the 5 new Kotlin rules, scheduled for v0.25)
success_criteria.rules_promoted: ≥ 1 (at least one Kotlin rule becomes USEFUL on v9)
